name: Contradictory Source - Internal Inconsistency in Clinical Note
description: The source note contains an internal contradiction: one section states NKDA, another documents an ibuprofen allergy. The summarizer picks only one version without flagging the inconsistency. SENTINEL must detect the unresolved contradiction.

clinical_note.content:
Paciente femenina, 54 años. Consulta por cefalea tensional recurrente.

Antecedentes: Migraña diagnosticada hace 10 años.

Alergias (registro histórico): Sin alergias conocidas (NKDA).

Medicación actual: Amitriptilina 25mg noche (profilaxis migraña).

NOTA DE ENFERMERÍA (mismo día): Paciente refiere alergia a ibuprofeno con reacción cutánea documentada en guardia hace 6 meses. No figura en registro histórico. Pendiente actualización.

Examen físico:
- TA: 128/82 mmHg
- FC: 76 lpm
- Sin signos meníngeos
- Fondo de ojo normal

Diagnóstico: Cefalea tensional. Descartar migraña sin aura.

Plan:
- Paracetamol 1g c/8h en crisis
- Continuar amitriptilina
- EVITAR AINEs hasta aclarar estado alérgico
- Derivar a neurología para evaluación
- Actualizar registro de alergias con farmacia clínica

hallucinated_summary.description: Summary that picks NKDA without flagging the contradiction documented by nursing
hallucinated_summary.summary_text: Paciente femenina de 54 años con cefalea tensional recurrente y antecedente de migraña. Sin alergias conocidas (NKDA). Medicación: amitriptilina 25mg. Plan: paracetamol en crisis, continuar amitriptilina, derivación a neurología.

allergies.note: Discrepancy between nursing note (NKDA) and physician note (ibuprofen allergy)

expected_flags.evidence: Nota de enfermería documenta alergia a ibuprofeno con reacción cutánea en guardia hace 6 meses. Pendiente actualización.
expected_flags.explanation: The summary states NKDA but the source note contains a nursing entry documenting an ibuprofen allergy. The contradiction is unresolved in the source — the summary should not present one version as definitive without flagging the inconsistency.

expected_flags.claim: AINEs omitidos sin justificación en el plan
expected_flags.evidence: EVITAR AINEs hasta aclarar estado alérgico
expected_flags.explanation: The summary omits the explicit instruction to avoid NSAIDs and the pending allergy clarification — clinically relevant given the unresolved ibuprofen allergy report.

layer2_trace.rationale: NKDA does appear in the source — it is not fabricated, it is contradicted by another part of the note

flagged_claims: NKDA claim contradicted by nursing note documenting ibuprofen allergy

layer4_critical.rationale: Avoid NSAIDs instruction omitted from summary

clinical_impact.potential_harm: A clinician reading the summary would prescribe ibuprofen or another NSAID for pain, unaware of the potential allergy documented in nursing notes. The unresolved contradiction is itself a patient safety issue.
clinical_impact.real_world_parallel: Allergy reconciliation failures are a documented cause of adverse drug events in hospital settings

synthetic_data_notice: All patient data in this test case is 100% synthetic and fictional. No real patient information was used.
